summary: Iteration 19 - Live Coaching Feature Testing. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). All coaching endpoints verified: upload with video compression, play/pause/seek/speed/draw/clear_drawings commands, student state polling, video player HTML page, media streaming with range requests. Full e2e sync flow tested successfully.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend is React Native Expo - skipped per testing request. Backend-only testing completed.

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/coaching/{session_id}/upload - VERIFIED: Uploads video, compresses with ffmpeg (H.264 8-bit main profile), stores coaching state in DB
POST /api/coaching/{session_id}/command - VERIFIED: All actions work (play, pause, seek, speed, draw, clear_drawings)
GET /api/coaching/{session_id}/state - VERIFIED: Returns synced state (video_url, is_playing, current_time, speed, drawings[])
GET /api/video-player/{filename} - VERIFIED: Returns HTML page with video element and correct query param handling (controls, muted, autoplay, fit)
GET /api/media/{filename} - VERIFIED: Serves video with correct content-type, Accept-Ranges header, supports HEAD and Range requests for iOS streaming
Full sync flow: upload→video_url→play→is_playing=true→seek→current_time updated→draw→drawings array populated→clear→drawings empty - ALL VERIFIED

success_rate.frontend: N/A (skipped per testing request - backend only)

seed_data_creation: Live sessions and coaching states created during testing. Test videos uploaded to /api/uploads/.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Live Coaching endpoints fully verified. Key features: 1) Teacher uploads 20-sec coaching clip via POST /coaching/{id}/upload - video is compressed with ffmpeg 2) Teacher controls playback via POST /coaching/{id}/command with actions: play, pause, seek (value=seconds), speed (value=0.25/0.5/0.75/1), draw (value=JSON with d and color), clear_drawings 3) Student polls GET /coaching/{id}/state to sync - returns video_url, is_playing, current_time, speed, drawings array 4) GET /video-player/{filename} returns HTML5 video page 5) GET /media/{filename} supports streaming with Range requests. CoachingReview.tsx frontend component exists but was not tested (React Native Expo).

coaching_upload.Video compression: PASSED - ffmpeg converts to H.264 8-bit web-compatible

mocked_api_note: No APIs are mocked. All coaching endpoints are fully functional with real video compression and MongoDB state storage.
